payload.answer: I could not remember the article content because the URL fetch failed with a 404/network error. I will not create durable memory from unavailable article content. The only safe record is that the user attempted to save the URL for the stated purpose, but the article itself was not retrievable.

entity_resolution.reason: The article content could not be fetched due to a 404/network error, so there are no verifiable source claims to store as durable memory.

details: No article claims were extracted or stored.
Durable memory commit deferred to avoid inventing unsupported content.

repair_options: Provide a working URL for the article.
Ask to remember only the URL and your stated reason, explicitly acknowledging the content was not fetched.
